fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 65 is inverted: `if not clamp` applies clamping when clamp is False and skips it when clamp is True, but the intent is to clamp when clamp=True.

constraints.intent: When clamp=True the branch body (clamping logic) should execute, so the branch condition should be `clamp`, not `not clamp`.
The then-branch (clamping) should only execute when clamp is True; if we enter it, clamp must be True (currently it is False due to the inverted condition).
The else-branch (no clamping) should only execute when clamp is False; if we enter it, clamp must be False (currently it is True due to the inverted condition).

spec.expr: not clamp or (min(y0, y1) <= __cbfl_result <= max(y0, y1))

constraints.intent: When clamp=True the returned value must lie within [min(y0,y1), max(y0,y1)].
